options Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual options Directory Reference(3)

NAME

options Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Directories


directory builder
directory completions
directory manpage
directory registry

Files


file actions.h
Action option callbacks for ascii-chat. file builder.h
Options builder API for flexible command-line option configuration. file colorscheme.h
file common.h
Common utilities and helpers for option parsing across all modes. file config.h
TOML configuration file support for ascii-chat. file enums.h
Option enum value definitions - single source of truth. file explicit.h
Check if an option was explicitly set via command-line. file groups.h
Option group definitions for composable mode presets. file layout.h
Two-column layout helpers for help text and option formatting. file levenshtein.h
Levenshtein distance algorithm for fuzzy string matching. file manpage.h
Man page template generation from options builder. file options.h
⚙️ Unified options parsing system for ascii-chat with builder pattern and lock-free access file parsers.h
Custom option parsers for enum types. file presets.h
Preset option configurations for ascii-chat modes. file rcu.h
file registry.h
Central registry of all command-line options with mode applicability. file schema.h
Schema metadata for config file options. file strings.h
Centralized enum and mode string conversion API. file validation.h
Validation functions for options parsing.

Version 0.9.2 ascii-chat
